name: Cholent
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
Lima beans must be completely soft before using.
Trim all excess fat from brisket. Combine softened lima beans, onions and water in Crock-Pot; mix well. Add brisket and seasonings. Cover and cook on Low for 16 to 24 hours. Serve slices meat over limas and onions with the natural juices over all.
